data.title: Grayscale Ethereum Trust Updates Trading Platforms
data.description:
Grayscale Ethereum Trust (ETH) ( (ETHE) ) has issued an announcement.

CoinDesk Indices, Inc. announced changes to the trading platforms used for the Grayscale Ethereum Trust ETF’s index price calculation. Effective September 21, 2025, Gemini was added to the CoinDesk Ether Price Index due to meeting liquidity requirements, while Bullish was removed for failing to meet these requirements. The current platforms include Coinbase, Kraken, Crypto.com, LMAX Digital, and Gemini. These changes are part of a scheduled quarterly review process, which allows for adjustments based on liquidity criteria.

data.title: DallasNews Completes Merger with Hearst, Delists from Nasdaq
data.description:
DallasNews ( (DALN) ) just unveiled an update.

On September 24, 2025, DallasNews Corporation completed its merger with Hearst, resulting in the cessation of trading of its Series A common stock on Nasdaq. Shareholders of DallasNews received an all-cash consideration of $16.50 per share. The merger, announced on July 10, 2025, and approved by shareholders on September 23, 2025, signifies a significant shift as The Dallas Morning News and Medium Giant will now operate under Hearst, a leading media company. This transition marks the end of DallasNews as a publicly traded entity, impacting its operations and positioning within the media industry.

DallasNews Corporation is the Dallas-based holding company of The Dallas Morning News and Medium Giant. Medium Giant is an integrated creative marketing agency with offices in Dallas and Tulsa, recognized for its work with premium brands and having received several industry awards, including an AAF Addy and the AMA DFW Annual Marketer of the Year Award in 2024.

data.title: IB Acquisition Corp. Extends Business Combination Deadline
data.description:
IB Acquisition Corp. ( (IBAC) ) has provided an update.

IB Acquisition Corp. held a special meeting on September 22, 2025, where stockholders approved amendments to extend the deadline for completing a business combination to March 28, 2026. The amendments also outline procedures for redemption and liquidation if the company fails to complete the business combination by the new deadline. Approximately 90.96% of the company’s common stock was represented at the meeting, and stockholders approved all proposals, including the extension and trust amendments. As a result, $106.1 million will be removed from the Trust Account to pay stockholders who opted to redeem their shares, leaving approximately $15.8 million in the account.

More about IB Acquisition Corp.
